details: Read all kernel files, design doc, test, and program descriptor. Identified potential CB sizing issue: cb_scores has scores_pages = B_q*B_kv = 1 page, but Phase 12 PV matmul pushes B_q*D_t = 2 tiles to cb_scores.

Phase 12 PV matmul shape of(B_q,D_t,B_q,D_t,B_kv,1) doubles both subblock counts AND subblock dims. With B_q=1,D_t=2: produces 4 tiles instead of 2. Also cb_scores has only B_q*B_kv=1 page but needs max(B_q*B_kv, B_q*D_t)=2 pages. Single-tile test passes because D_t=1 makes the wrong shape accidentally correct.

Two bugs: (1) Phase 12 MatmulBlockShape::of(B_q,D_t,B_q,D_t,B_kv,1) has in1_num_subblocks=D_t instead of 1, producing B_q*D_t*D_t tiles instead of B_q*D_t. With B_q=1,D_t=2: 4 tiles instead of 2. (2) cb_scores sized for B_q*B_kv pages but needs max(B_q*B_kv, B_q*D_t) for Phase 12 output. Single-tile passes because D_t=1 makes bug#1 inert and B_q*B_kv == B_q*D_t == 1.

cb_scaler has only 2 pages but reader runs ahead of compute. Reader pushes 2 scaler tiles per KV block, fills CB, then blocks on next KV block scalers. Fix: push scalers once before KV loop, compute reuses without popping, pop once after all KV blocks.

Double-pop on cb_k and cb_v: matmul_block already pops K/V tiles (WaitAndPopPerKBlock), but cleanup at end of KV block also does cb_pop_front(cb_k/v, B_kv*D_t). This causes CB underflow, tiles_received wraps unsigned, subsequent wait_front succeeds on empty CB, matmul reads garbage, pipeline deadlocks.

Fixed 4 bugs: (1) Phase 12 PV matmul shape doubled N dimension, (2) cb_scores too small for PV output, (3) double-pop on cb_k/cb_v, (4) cb_scaler too small causing reader deadlock. Remaining: Q block boundary hang at Phase 8 after re-init. Single-tile test passes. Multi-tile Q block 0 with all 4 KV blocks completes; Q block 1 hangs at Phase 3 reduce.
